response.step_by_step_log: Identified the song 'Triangle Dreamer' (トライアングル・ドリーマー) from on-screen text in the video. Identified the performers as Hololive members Omaru Polka, Houshou Marine, and Shiranui Flare based on character design. Searched for 'Triangle Dreamer Niji no Conquistador Japanese and English lyrics'. Found the lyrics on Uta-Net and provided the original Japanese and a translation. Used the whole video as one scene.
response.global_summary: A performance of "Triangle Dreamer" by Omaru Polka, Houshou Marine, and Shiranui Flare at Omaru Polka's 2026 birthday concert.

scenes.description: Omaru Polka, Houshou Marine, and Shiranui Flare perform 'Triangle Dreamer' on stage.
scenes.performer_in_video: Omaru Polka, Houshou Marine, Shiranui Flare
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
day by day 日に日に募るの乙女心
おんなじクラス斜め前のおとなしい人
カッコ良くはない だけど優しい
いつも頼れる彼
after school 恋愛相談の帰り道
なんだって話せる親友の女の子
スポーツ万能 勉強もできて
女子力MAXです
どこにでもある よくあること
急に彼女が
「あのね、実は私好きな人がいるのって」
トライアングル！トライアングル！この恋は支離滅裂
一瞬で 一瞬で崩れ去る
トライアングル！トライアングル！この恋は不安定
突然 突然 逃げ場なし
ちょ、マジで！
私があなたを好きなの ごめん！
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Day by day, my maiden heart grows more and more.
The quiet guy who sits diagonally in front of me in the same class.
He's not cool, but he's kind.
He's always someone I can rely on.
After school, on the way home from talking about love.
My best friend who I can talk to about anything.
She's good at sports, good at studying.
Her femininity is at its max.
It's something that happens everywhere, something common.
Suddenly she says,
"Hey, actually, I have someone I like."
Triangle! Triangle! This love is chaotic.
In an instant, in an instant, it crumbles.
Triangle! Triangle! This love is unstable.
Suddenly, suddenly, I have nowhere to go.
Wait, that's not what I meant.
I'm the one who likes you, sorry!
